description: The second page of the same FCC press release (a white document scan with minimal design). It continues the serif body text from the prior page, opening 'coverage will be complemented by new mid-band spectrum that boosts capacity and speeds, especially for fixed wireless to the home.' It then presents a bold-headed quote block, 'Chairman Carr issued the following statement:', with two paragraphs of direct quotation crediting President Trump for America 'leading the world again in next-gen technology' and describing the FCC's 'Build America agenda' two-part play (FCC auctions and secondary-market transactions) to release approximately 300 megahertz of spectrum by the end of 2027. A further section headed 'Additional Background Information' lists bold bullet items: '5G Spectrum to AT&T,' 'D2D Spectrum to SpaceX,' 'A Future for Boost Mobile,' 'Tech-Neutral Innovation,' and 'Stringent Buildout Conditions,' each with explanatory text about EchoStar/AT&T/SpaceX spectrum deals. There is no illustration, photo, or meme styling. The text credits the administration.
notable_text: Chairman Carr issued the following statement: 'Thanks to President Trump, America is leading the world again in next-gen technology.'; Build America agenda; Additional Background Information
